action.reasoning: Observation: I'm getting a RuntimeError during collation because the tensors have different sizes. This is happening because the input sequences have different lengths after concatenation. The error occurs when trying to stack tensors of different sizes in the batch. I need to modify the dataset implementation to pad sequences to the same length before returning them. The issue is that I'm concatenating input and target IDs which results in variable-length sequences that can't be batched together without padding.
